name: Jack o' Frost
overview: With their tumultuous relationship wiped from his ex-boyfriend's memory after an accident, Fumiya capitalizes on Okusawa's amnesia to start anew.

trailers.title: Jack o' Frost | Official Trailer 2 | Is their love story in the past as good as new?
Jack o' Frost | Official Trailer 1 | While his memories remain frozen, can they fall in love again?
